questions.text: Explain the time complexity of QuickSort in average and worst cases. Derive the recurrence.

criteria.text: Correct average case O(n log n)

questions.text: Compare BFS and DFS. When would you use each?

criteria.text: BFS uses a queue; DFS uses a stack
BFS finds shortest path in unweighted graphs
DFS useful for topological sort / cycle detection
Correct time complexity O(V+E) for both
